academic_rules.exam_integrity: Zero tolerance for proctoring violations (Tab switching, Copy/Paste)

faq.question: How is GPA calculated?
faq.answer: GPA in this system is calculated based on your attendance percentage. Higher attendance leads to a higher predicted GPA.

faq.question: What happens if I switch tabs during an exam?
faq.answer: The system detects tab switching and reports it as a proctoring violation to your professor in real-time.
